common.tagline: Predict the Cup with your crew.

landing.heroTitle: The Cup isn't a solo experience.
landing.heroSubtitle: Predict every match, challenge your friends, and keep score all the way to the final on July 19.
landing.feature1Body: Virtual chips, real-money settlement validated by an admin. The ledger lives in the app, trust stays IRL.
landing.feature2Body: Friends' bets reveal only at kickoff. Not before. Cheating is impossible.
landing.feature3Body: Every match of the new format, from the first kickoff to the final.
